message: The export button on the reports page does nothing when I click it on Safari. Works fine on Chrome. Been broken for two days now.
Honestly the new dashboard layout is fantastic. Loading times feel way faster and I found the filters I needed in seconds. Great work.
It would be amazing if I could schedule reports to email automatically every Monday morning instead of running them by hand.
I have now been charged twice for the same month and nobody from support has replied to my three emails. This is completely unacceptable.
App crashes every time I upload a CSV larger than about 5MB. Smaller files import fine. Using the latest version on Windows.
Please add dark mode. My team works late and the bright white screens are rough on the eyes.
Your onboarding flow is the smoothest I've used in any SaaS product. I was up and running in under five minutes. Kudos to the team.
The mobile site logs me out every few minutes and I lose what I was typing. Extremely frustrating when I'm on the go.
Could you support exporting to Google Sheets directly? Right now I download a CSV and re-import it which is an extra step every day.
Search returns results that are weeks old even when I filter by 'this week'. The date filter seems to be ignored entirely.
